allow: Write and edit files in the workspace
Run sbt compile, sbt test, sbt scalafmtAll, sbt scalafmtCheck
Run npm run build, npm run lint, npm run fix, npm run type-check in modules/ui/
Run git status, git diff, git log
Create new files in src/ directories
deny: Delete files outside the project directory
Install global npm or system packages
Access network resources without explicit approval
Execute arbitrary shell scripts not related to build/test
Modify build.sbt or project/plugins.sbt without approval
Access or modify the H2 database file directly (data/pi-farm.mv.db)
Modify existing Flyway migration files (V*.sql) — only create new ones
